Booking create server hint after generic: Check the API log for the real exception. Common causes: duplicate rental contract number (Basame), or customer/vehicle/branch not matching the selected fleet.
Booking missing customer birth date: Customer date of birth is missing or invalid for the booking API. Update the customer profile with a Gregorian birth date.
Complete customer basic information befo: Complete customer basic information before booking
Create a booking after selecting a custo: Create a booking after selecting a customer and an available vehicle.
End date cannot be before start date: End date cannot be before start date
Example Booking Notes: Example: Delivery from the main branch is included in this booking.
Hint Booking Branch: Enter the operational branch number linked to this booking.
Hint Booking Customer: Select the customer who should own this reservation.
Hint Booking Daily Price: Enter the daily vehicle price for this booking.
Hint Booking End Date: Set the expected booking end date.
Hint Booking Monthly Price: Enter the monthly price when the booking spans a long duration.
Hint Booking Return Date: Set the actual or expected vehicle return date.
Hint Booking Start Date: Set the booking contract start date.
Hint Booking Total: Enter the total booking value before final settlement.
Hint Booking Vehicle: Select the available vehicle to attach to this booking.
Identity Number must be 10 digits: Identity Number must be exactly 10 digits
Paid cash and bank must equal paid amoun: Paid cash and paid bank must equal the paid amount.
Reservations across fleets, branches, cu: Reservations across fleets, branches, customers, and vehicles.
Return date cannot be before start date: Return date cannot be before start date
Select customer and vehicle, validate da: Select customer and vehicle, validate dates, then confirm the reservation.
Booking smart banner daily: Daily rental band for this class: {{range}}.
Booking smart banner formula: Suggested rental subtotal = days × daily price − discount; add extras, tax, and transport for the contract total.
Booking smart days synced: Rental days update automatically from start and end dates (inclusive).
Booking smart grand total: Suggested contract total (subtotal + extras + tax + transport): {{amount}}
Booking smart hint kmPrice: Extra km price is not defined on the category; set it according to your branch policy.
Booking category hints unavailable: Pricing hints from the vehicle class could not be loaded (check category link on the vehicle). You can still enter prices manually.
Booking invalid contract dates: Contract dates are missing or invalid for the server. Use the date pickers (Gregorian).
Customer license date invalid for bookin: Driving licence expiry must be a valid Gregorian date (or ISO). Update the customer profile if it is stored only as Hijri text.
Booking license hijri not accepted: The licence expiry on the customer profile looks Hijri (e.g. 1447/2/22). Enter a Gregorian expiry date on the customer card before creating a booking.
Booking license need Gregorian in custom: No Gregorian licence expiry is set on the customer. Edit the customer and fill the Gregorian expiry field (Hijri alone cannot be sent to the server).
Booking invalid vehicle selection: Vehicle selection is invalid. Pick a vehicle again.
Booking invalid customer selection: Customer selection is invalid. Pick a customer again.
Booking invalid branch id: Branch ID is invalid. Enter a numeric branch id (Western digits).
Allow booking if driving license is expi: Allow booking if driving license is expired
Allow booking if license and nationality: Allow booking if license and nationality documents are expired
Allow booking if vehicle registration an: Allow booking if vehicle registration and insurance are expired
Show interrupted GPS distance in contrac: Show interrupted GPS distance in contract
Booking restriction license expired not: Cannot create this booking because the driving licence is expired, and current booking restrictions do not allow it.
Booking restriction license and national: Cannot create this booking because the licence and nationality documents are expired, and current booking restrictions do not allow it.
Booking restriction vehicle registration: Cannot create this booking because the vehicle registration and insurance are expired, and current booking restrictions do not allow it.
Booking tax auto hint: Tax is calculated from your fleet settings ({{rate}}%) on the discounted amount; it cannot be edited manually on this form.
Booking contract limit free late hours e: Late hours ({{current}}) are above allowed free hours ({{allowed}}).
Booking contract limit late per day exce: Late day/hour value ({{current}}) is above the allowed daily limit ({{allowed}}).
Booking contract limit extra km exceeded: Extra kilometers ({{current}}) are above the allowed closing limit ({{allowed}}).
Booking minimum paid at create not met: Cannot create booking because paid amount ({{paid}}) is below the minimum required at booking time ({{min}}).
Booking band smart hint: Band limits (min/max) come from the vehicle class and cannot be changed here. Contract prices default to the upper value. You may enter any number in the contract fields; if it falls outside the band, a warning appears under the field. Use Min / Mid / Max to snap to the band ends or midpoint.
Booking contract price band hint daily: This value ({{current}}) is outside the daily rate band ({{min}}–{{max}}).
Booking contract price band hint hour: This value ({{current}}) is outside the extra-hour rate band ({{min}}–{{max}}).
Booking contract price band hint km: This value ({{current}}) is outside the extra-km rate band ({{min}}–{{max}}).
